revision.text:
{{Concept | Name=NC State Wolfpack | Guid=3015-13174 | Aliases=North Carolina State Wolfpack | Deck=The Wolfpack are North Carolina State University's athletic teams. | Characters= | Concepts= | Franchises= | Games=Games/EA_Sports_College_Football_25,Games/EA_Sports_College_Football_26,Games/March_Madness_98,Games/NCAA_Football_09 | Locations=Locations/North_Carolina,Locations/Raleigh,Locations/The_United_States_of_America | Objects= | People= | Image=https://www.giantbomb.com/a/uploads/scale_super/0/1992/3601777-9228322475-images.png}}

{{Concept | Name=Navy Midshipmen | Guid=3015-13173 | Deck=The Midshipmen are the United States Naval Academy's athletics teams. | Characters= | Concepts=Concepts/United_States_Navy | Franchises= | Games=Games/EA_Sports_College_Football_25,Games/EA_Sports_College_Football_26,Games/NCAA_Football_09,Games/NCAA_Football_2002 | Locations=Locations/Annapolis,Locations/Maryland,Locations/The_United_States_of_America | Objects= | People= | Image=https://www.giantbomb.com/a/uploads/scale_super/0/1992/3601731-1871776516-1200p.png}}

<div id='imageData' data-json='{"infobox":{"file":"3723395-6770766960-Nayko.jpg","path":"59\/594908\/","mime":"image\/jpeg","sizes":"scale_small,square_medium,scale_medium,scale_super,square_small,square_avatar,screen_kubrick,scale_large,scale_avatar,square_mini,square_tiny,screen_medium","caption":null},"background":[]}' /> The feline counterpart of Kobolds.

{{Concept | Name=Nebraska Cornhuskers | Guid=3015-13175 | Deck=The Cornhuskers are the University of Nebraska's athletics teams. | Characters= | Concepts= | Franchises= | Games=Games/EA_Sports_College_Football_25,Games/EA_Sports_College_Football_26,Games/March_Madness_98,Games/MVP_06_NCAA_Baseball,Games/MVP_07_NCAA_Baseball,Games/NCAA_Basketball_10,Games/NCAA_Football_09,Games/NCAA_Football_2002 | Locations=Locations/Lincoln,Locations/Nebraska,Locations/The_United_States_of_America | Objects= | People= | Image=https://www.giantbomb.com/a/uploads/scale_super/0/1992/3601737-2346997068-1200p.png}}
<div id='imageData' data-json='{"infobox":{"file":"3601737-2346997068-1200p.png","path":"0\/1992\/","mime":"image\/png","sizes":"square_small,square_avatar,scale_small,scale_super,scale_medium,square_tiny,square_medium,square_mini,scale_large,scale_avatar,screen_medium,screen_kubrick","caption":null},"background":[]}' /> The Cornhuskers are the University of Nebraska's athletics teams.

{{Concept | Name=Neck Cracking | Guid=3015-13603 | Deck=When characters demonstratively crack their neck vertebrae or jaw, turning their head sharply to one side, sometimes helping themselves with their hands | Characters=Characters/Bayman,Characters/Havik,Characters/Meat,Characters/Scorpion | Concepts=Concepts/Idle_Animations,Concepts/Taunting | Franchises= | Games=Games/Dead_or_Alive_4,Games/Dead_or_Alive_Xtreme_Beach_Volleyball,Games/Mortal_Kombat_11,Games/Mortal_Kombat_2011,Games/Mortal_Kombat_vs_DC_Universe,Games/Mortal_Kombat_X,Games/Runaway_A_Twist_of_Fate | Locations= | Objects= | People= | Image=https://www.giantbomb.com/a/uploads/scale_super/173/1734046/3788434-mortalkombatmobile-characterscrunchingtheirnecks.jpg}}
<div id='imageData' data-json='{"infobox":{"file":"3788434-mortalkombatmobile-characterscrunchingtheirnecks.jpg","path":"173\/1734046\/","mime":"image\/jpeg","sizes":"square_small,square_medium,scale_super,square_avatar,scale_medium,scale_small,screen_medium,square_mini,scale_large,scale_avatar,screen_kubrick,square_tiny,scale_tiny","caption":"Mortal Kombat Mobile - Characters Crunching Their Necks"},"background":[]}' /> This move can usually be found in fighting games between rounds, in cutscenes, or as idle animation. It can also be a type of manually executed taunt, as if showing the opponent that the attacks performed on them were weak.

{{Concept | Name=Neptunemon | Guid=3015-13437 | Deck=Neptunemon is a Mega-level Shaman Digimon and a member of the Olympos XII. | Characters= | Concepts=Concepts/Digimon,Concepts/Digivolution,Concepts/Falcomon,Concepts/God,Concepts/Merfolk,Concepts/Seadramon,Concepts/Whamon,Concepts/Zudomon | Franchises= | Games=Games/Digimon_Battle,Games/Digimon_Heroes,Games/Digimon_Masters,Games/Digimon_ReArise,Games/Digimon_Story_Cyber_Sleuth,Games/Digimon_Story_Cyber_Sleuth_Complete_Edition,Games/Digimon_Story_Cyber_Sleuth_Hackers_Memory,Games/Digimon_Story_Lost_Evolution,Games/Digimon_Story_Super_Xros_Wars_Blue_Red,Games/Digimon_Story_Time_Stranger,Games/Digimon_World_Data_Squad,Games/Digimon_World_DS | Locations=Locations/Cyberspace,Locations/Ocean | Objects=Objects/Armor,Objects/Spear | People= | Image=https://www.giantbomb.com/a/uploads/scale_super/16/164924/3812886-5291072107-latest.jpg}}
<div id='imageData' data-json='{"infobox":{"file":"3812886-5291072107-latest.jpg","path":"16\/164924\/","mime":"image\/jpeg","sizes":"scale_super,scale_small,scale_medium,square_medium,square_tiny,square_small,square_avatar,scale_tiny","caption":null},"background":[]}' /> Neptunemon is a Mega-level Shaman Digimon and a member of the Olympos XII.

{{Concept | Name=Nevada Wolf Pack | Guid=3015-13176 | Deck=The Wolf Pack are the University of Nevada's athletics teams. | Characters= | Concepts= | Franchises= | Games=Games/EA_Sports_College_Football_25,Games/EA_Sports_College_Football_26,Games/NCAA_Football_09,Games/NCAA_Football_2002 | Locations=Locations/Nevada,Locations/Reno,Locations/The_United_States_of_America | Objects= | People= | Image=https://www.giantbomb.com/a/uploads/scale_super/0/1992/3601738-2336007900-images.jpg}}
<div id='imageData' data-json='{"infobox":{"file":"3601738-2336007900-images.jpg","path":"0\/1992\/","mime":"image\/jpeg","sizes":"square_medium,scale_super,square_avatar,square_small,square_mini,scale_tiny,scale_small,scale_medium,square_tiny,scale_avatar,screen_medium,screen_kubrick,scale_large","caption":null},"background":[]}' /> The Wolf Pack are the University of Nevada's athletics teams.

{{Concept | Name=New Mexico Lobos | Guid=3015-13177 | Deck=The Lobos are the University of New Mexico's athletics teams. | Characters= | Concepts= | Franchises= | Games=Games/EA_Sports_College_Football_25,Games/EA_Sports_College_Football_26,Games/March_Madness_98,Games/NCAA_Football_09,Games/NCAA_Football_2002 | Locations=Locations/Albuquerque,Locations/New_Mexico,Locations/The_United_States_of_America | Objects= | People= | Image=https://www.giantbomb.com/a/uploads/scale_super/0/1992/3601744-8611767040-images.jpg}}
<div id='imageData' data-json='{"infobox":{"file":"3601744-8611767040-images.jpg","path":"0\/1992\/","mime":"image\/jpeg","sizes":"square_avatar,square_medium,scale_super,square_small,scale_small,scale_tiny,scale_medium,square_tiny,scale_avatar,scale_large,square_mini,screen_kubrick,screen_medium","caption":null},"background":[]}' /> The Lobos are the University of New Mexico's athletics teams.

{{Concept | Name=New Mexico State Aggies | Guid=3015-13178 | Deck=The Aggies are New Mexico State University's athletics teams. | Characters= | Concepts= | Franchises= | Games=Games/EA_Sports_College_Football_25,Games/EA_Sports_College_Football_26,Games/NCAA_Football_09,Games/NCAA_Football_14,Games/NCAA_Football_2002 | Locations=Locations/Las_Cruces,Locations/New_Mexico,Locations/The_United_States_of_America | Objects=Objects/Football | People= | Image=https://www.giantbomb.com/a/uploads/scale_super/0/1992/3601751-1888510469-latest.jpg}}
<div id='imageData' data-json='{"infobox":{"file":"3601751-1888510469-latest.jpg","path":"0\/1992\/","mime":"image\/jpeg","sizes":"scale_medium,scale_super,square_avatar,square_medium,square_small,scale_tiny,scale_small,square_tiny,square_mini,scale_avatar,scale_large,screen_kubrick,screen_medium","caption":null},"background":[]}' /> The Aggies are New Mexico State University's athletics teams.

{{Concept | Name=Night Lords | Guid=3015-13279 | Deck=The 8th of the founding Space Marine legions, they fell to Chaos and became a band of depraved, nihilistic killers. Experts at striking from the shadows and using fear as a weapon, they avoid fair fights and gleefully exercise their sadistic urges on anyone they can find, the more defenseless the better. | Characters= | Concepts=Concepts/Adeptus_Astartes,Concepts/Chaos,Concepts/Chaos_Space_Marines,Concepts/Cowardly_Enemies,Concepts/Murder,Concepts/Nihilism,Concepts/Psychopaths,Concepts/Sadism,Concepts/Skull_Helmets,Concepts/Stealth,Concepts/Terror,Concepts/Torture,Concepts/War | Franchises= | Games=Games/Warhammer_40_000_Dark_Heresy,Games/Warhammer_40_000_Space_Marine_II | Locations= | Objects=Objects/Boltgun,Objects/Chainsword,Objects/Claw,Objects/Gauntlets,Objects/Heavy_Bolter,Objects/Helmet,Objects/Jet_Pack,Objects/Plasma_Pistol_1159,Objects/Power_Armor,Objects/Skull,Objects/Thunder_Hammer | People= | Image=https://www.giantbomb.com/a/uploads/scale_super/77/776653/3621941-nlhh.jpg}}
<div id='imageData' data-json='{"infobox":{"file":"3621941-nlhh.jpg","path":"77\/776653\/","mime":"image\/jpeg","sizes":"square_small,square_medium,square_tiny,scale_super,scale_medium,scale_small,square_mini,scale_avatar,square_avatar,screen_medium,screen_kubrick,scale_large","caption":null},"background":[]}' /> The 8th of the founding Space Marine legions, they fell to Chaos and became a band of depraved, nihilistic killers. Experts at striking from the shadows and using fear as a weapon, they avoid fair fights and gleefully exercise their sadistic urges on anyone they can find, the more defenseless the better.

{{Concept | Name=Niko-chan | Guid=3015-13278 | Deck=A race of aliens in Dr. Slump media (and briefly, Dragon Ball) which have butts on top of their heads and nostrils on antennae. | Characters=Characters/King_Niko_chan | Concepts=Concepts/Alien | Franchises= | Games=Games/Arale_no_Jump_Up,Games/Dr_Slump,Games/Dr_Slump_And_Arale_Chan,Games/Dragon_Ball_Origins_2 | Locations= | Objects= | People= | Image=https://www.giantbomb.com/a/uploads/scale_super/16/164924/3624576-5710830484-340.png}}
<div id='imageData' data-json='{"infobox":{"file":"3624576-5710830484-340.png","path":"16\/164924\/","mime":"image\/png","sizes":"scale_small,scale_super,square_small,square_avatar,scale_medium,scale_tiny,square_medium,screen_kubrick,scale_large,scale_avatar,square_mini,square_tiny,screen_medium","caption":null},"background":[]}' /> A race of aliens in Dr. Slump media (and briefly, Dragon Ball) which have butts on top of their heads and nostrils on antennae.

{{Concept | Name=Nilgai | Guid=3015-13471 | Characters= | Concepts= | Franchises= | Games=Games/Age_of_Empires_III_The_Asian_Dynasties | Locations= | Objects= | People= }}
<div id='imageData' data-json='{"infobox":[],"background":[]}' />

{{Concept |Guid=3015-13443 |Name=Nintendo GameCube – Nintendo Classics |Aliases=Nintendo GameCube – Nintendo Switch Online |Image=https://www.giantbomb.com/a/uploads/scale_super/0/1992/3717371-5327369946-GniM9-3aMAAbfTp.jpg |Deck=Nintendo GameCube classics made available to subscribers of the Nintendo Switch Online Expansion Pack. |Concepts=Concepts/Game_Boy_Advance_Nintendo_Classics, Concepts/Game_Boy_Nintendo_Classics, Concepts/Nintendo_64_Nintendo_Classics, Concepts/Nintendo_Entertainment_System_Nintendo_Classics, Concepts/Nintendo_Switch_Online, Concepts/Sega_Genesis_Nintendo_Classics, Concepts/Super_Nintendo_Entertainment_System_Nintendo_Classics, Concepts/Virtual_Boy_Nintendo_Classics |Games=Games/Chibi_Robo, Games/F_Zero_GX, Games/Fire_Emblem_Path_of_Radiance, Games/Luigis_Mansion, Games/Pokemon_Colosseum, Games/Pokemon_XD_Gale_of_Darkness, Games/Soulcalibur_II, Games/Super_Mario_Strikers, Games/Super_Mario_Sunshine, Games/The_Legend_of_Zelda_The_Wind_Waker, Games/Pokemon XD Gale of Darkness }} == Overview == The [[Platforms/GameCube|Nintendo GameCube]] library was added to the [[Concepts/Nintendo Switch Online|Nintendo Switch Online]] + Expansion Pack subscription service on June 5, 2025 alongside the launch of the [[Platforms/Nintendo Switch 2|Nintendo Switch 2]].
{| class="wikitable" style="margin:auto;width:100%;" !Date !Game !NA/PAL/KR !JP/HK |- |June 5, 2025 |[[Games/F Zero GX|F-Zero GX]] |X |X |- | |[[Games/The Legend of Zelda The Wind Waker|The Legend of Zelda: The Wind Waker]] |X |X |- | |[[Games/Soulcalibur II|Soulcalibur II]] |X |X |- |July 3, 2025 |[[Games/Super Mario Strikers|Super Mario Strikers]] |X |X |- |August 21, 2025 |[[Games/Chibi Robo|Chibi-Robo!]] |X |X |- |October 30, 2025 |[[Games/Luigis Mansion|Luigi's Mansion]] |X |X |- |January 9, 2026 |[[Games/Fire Emblem Path of Radiance|Fire Emblem: Path of Radiance]] |X |X |- |March 17, 2026 |[[Games/Pokemon XD Gale of Darkness|Pokémon XD: Gale of Darkness]] |X |X |- |TBA |[[Games/Pokemon Colosseum|Pokémon Colosseum]] | | |- | |[[Games/Super Mario Sunshine|Super Mario Sunshine]] | | |}

revision.comment: Point cover at a rendition that actually serves
revision.text:
{{Concept | Name=Nintendo GameShare | Guid=3015-13445 | Deck=Select Nintendo Switch and Nintendo Switch 2 multiplayer games are playable with only one person owning the game. | Characters= | Concepts= | Franchises= | Games=Games/Big_Brain_Academy_Brain_vs_Brain,Games/Captain_Toad_Treasure_Tracker,Games/Clubhouse_Games_51_Worldwide_Classics,Games/Super_Mario_3D_World,Games/Super_Mario_Odyssey | Locations= | Objects= | People= | Image=https://www.giantbomb.com/a/uploads/scale_super/0/1992/3716958-nintendodirect_nintendoswitch2%E2%80%934.2.2025-youtube-0-12-27.jpeg}}
<div id='imageData' data-json='{"infobox":{"file":"3716958-nintendodirect_nintendoswitch2\u20134.2.2025-youtube-0-12-27.jpeg","path":"0\/1992\/","mime":"image\/jpeg","sizes":"scale_tiny,scale_super,square_small,scale_small,scale_medium,square_mini,square_tiny,square_medium,square_avatar,scale_large,scale_avatar,screen_medium,screen_kubrick","caption":""},"background":[]}' /> Select Nintendo Switch and Nintendo Switch 2 multiplayer games are playable with only one person owning the game.

page.title: Concepts/Non Fighting Game modes in Fighting Games

revision.text:
{{Concept | Name=Non-Fighting Game modes in Fighting Games | Guid=3015-13446 | Deck=Some modes/features had non-fighting game elements in Fighting Games. | Characters= | Concepts=Concepts/Adventure_Mode_in_a_Fighting_Game,Concepts/Bonus_Game,Concepts/Fighting_Multiplayer_Modes_in_Non_Fighting_Games,Concepts/Unlockables | Franchises= | Games=Games/Chaos_Code_New_Sign_of_Catastrophe,Games/Ehrgeiz_God_Bless_the_Ring,Games/Fate_Unlimited_Codes,Games/Granblue_Fantasy_Versus_Rising,Games/Mortal_Kombat_Armageddon,Games/Mortal_Kombat_Deception,Games/Mortal_Kombat_Unchained,Games/Pocket_Bravery,Games/Power_Stone,Games/Power_Stone_Collection,Games/Project_Justice,Games/Rival_Schools_United_by_Fate,Games/Shiritsu_Justice_Gakuen_Nekketsu_Seishun_Nikki_2,Games/SNK_vs_Capcom_Match_of_the_Millennium,Games/Super_Smash_Bros,Games/Super_Smash_Bros_Brawl,Games/Super_Smash_Bros_for_Wii_U_Nintendo_3DS,Games/Super_Smash_Bros_Melee,Games/Tatsunoko_vs_Capcom_Cross_Generation_of_Heroes,Games/Tatsunoko_vs_Capcom_Ultimate_All_Stars,Games/Tekken_3,Games/Tekken_4,Games/Tekken_5,Games/Tekken_6_Bloodline_Rebellion,Games/Tekken_7_Fated_Retribution,Games/Tekken_8,Games/Tekken_Tag_Tournament,Games/Tekken_Tag_Tournament_2,Games/The_Last_Blade,Games/The_Last_Blade_2,Games/The_Last_Blade_Beyond_the_Destiny,Games/Toshinden_4,Games/Ultimate_Mortal_Kombat,Games/Ultra_Street_Fighter_II_The_Final_Challengers | Locations= | Objects= | People= | Image=https://www.giantbomb.com/a/uploads/scale_super/36/361609/3718036-img_8124.jpeg}}
<div id='imageData' data-json='{"infobox":{"file":"3718036-img_8124.jpeg","path":"36\/361609\/","mime":"image\/jpeg","sizes":"square_small,square_medium,square_mini,scale_super,scale_medium,square_avatar,scale_small,scale_avatar,square_tiny,scale_large,scale_tiny,screen_medium,screen_kubrick","caption":null},"background":[]}' /> Some modes/features had non-fighting game elements in Fighting Games.

{{Concept | Name=North Carolina Tar Heels | Guid=3015-13179 | Deck=The Tar Heels are the University of North Carolina's athletics teams. | Characters= | Concepts= | Franchises= | Games=Games/EA_Sports_College_Football_25,Games/EA_Sports_College_Football_26,Games/March_Madness_98,Games/NCAA_Football_09,Games/NCAA_Football_2002 | Locations=Locations/Chapel_Hill,Locations/North_Carolina,Locations/Southern_United_States,Locations/The_United_States_of_America | Objects= | People= | Image=https://www.giantbomb.com/a/uploads/scale_super/0/1992/3601778-9178460999-1200p.png}}

{{Concept | Name=Northern Illinois Huskies | Guid=3015-13181 | Deck=The Huskies are Northern Illinois University's athletics teams. | Characters= | Concepts= | Franchises= | Games=Games/EA_Sports_College_Football_25,Games/EA_Sports_College_Football_26,Games/NCAA_Football_09,Games/NCAA_Football_2002 | Locations=Locations/DeKalb,Locations/Illinois,Locations/The_United_States_of_America | Objects= | People= | Image=https://www.giantbomb.com/a/uploads/scale_super/0/1992/3601789-6965254361-images.png}}

{{Concept | Name=Obstructive NPC | Guid=3015-13620 | Aliases=NPCs Blocking the Path | Deck=An element of bad game design sometimes found in old RPGs where characters in densely populated city locations end up accidentally blocking the protagonist's path. | Characters=Characters/Fawkes | Concepts=Concepts/Aberrant_A_I_Behaviour,Concepts/Glitch,Concepts/Non_Player_Character | Franchises= | Games=Games/Fallout_3,Games/Final_Fantasy,Games/Mega_Man_Star_Force,Games/Sword_of_Vermilion,Games/Ultima_III_Exodus | Locations= | Objects= | People= | Image=https://www.giantbomb.com/a/uploads/scale_super/173/1734046/3793412-swordofvermilion-npcsblockingthepath.jpg}}

revision.text:

revision.comment: Point cover at a rendition that actually serves
revision.text:
{{Concept | Name=Peeking Through the Cracks | Guid=3015-13313 | Aliases=Voyeurism,Peephole | Deck=Gameplay or storyline ability to look into neighboring rooms through unintended openings: keyholes, cracks in walls, holes in fences, ajar doors, in order to learn enemy location, gather information, or voyeurism | Characters=Characters/Eileen_Galvin,Characters/Henry_Townshend | Concepts=Concepts/Eavesdropping,Concepts/Eroge,Concepts/Looking_through_the_Door_Peephole,Concepts/Sexualized_Men,Concepts/Sexualized_Women,Concepts/Spies,Concepts/Stealth | Franchises= | Games=Games/Calling,Games/Covert_Ops_Nuclear_Dawn,Games/Haunting_Ground,Games/Omori,Games/Silent_Hill_4_The_Room | Locations=Locations/Bedroom,Locations/Living_Room,Locations/Motel | Objects=Objects/Panties,Objects/Underwear | People= | Image=https://www.giantbomb.com/a/uploads/scale_super/173/1734046/3642618-%D0%91%D1%83%D1%84%D0%B5%D1%80%D0%BE%D0%B1%D0%BC%D0%B5%D0%BD%D0%B0_10-26-2024_01.jpg}}
<div id='imageData' data-json='{"infobox":{"file":"3642618-\u0411\u0443\u0444\u0435\u0440\u043e\u0431\u043c\u0435\u043d\u0430_10-26-2024_01.jpg","path":"173\/1734046\/","mime":"image\/jpeg","sizes":"square_mini,square_medium,square_small,scale_small,scale_super,scale_medium,square_avatar,square_tiny,scale_tiny,scale_avatar,scale_large,screen_medium,screen_kubrick","caption":"Silent Hill 4"},"background":[]}' /> Gameplay or storyline ability to look into neighboring rooms through unintended openings: keyholes, cracks in walls, holes in fences, ajar doors, in order to learn enemy location, gather information, or voyeurism

{{Concept | Name=Pegasusmon | Guid=3015-13625 | Deck=Pegasusmon is an Armor level Digimon usually associated with Patamon. | Characters=Characters/T_K_Takaishi | Concepts=Concepts/Digimon,Concepts/Digivolution,Concepts/MagnaAngemon,Concepts/Patamon,Concepts/Pegasus,Concepts/Salamon | Franchises= | Games=Games/Digimon_Battle,Games/Digimon_Digital_Card_Battle,Games/Digimon_Heroes,Games/Digimon_Masters,Games/Digimon_Story_Time_Stranger,Games/Digimon_Tamers_Brave_Tamer,Games/Digimon_Tamers_Digimon_Medley,Games/Digimon_World_Data_Squad | Locations=Locations/Cyberspace | Objects=Objects/Armor | People= | Image=https://www.giantbomb.com/a/uploads/scale_super/16/164924/3814479-0276730270-latest.jpg}}
